name: Walker & Dunlop, Inc.
summary: Our BusinessAffordable Housing Real Estate Services, our affordable housing real estate service derives revenue from the syndication of partnership interests in properties eligible for low-income housing tax credits, or LIHTCs. Congress could repeal or modify theLIHTC provisions at any time or modify the tax laws so that the value of LIHTC benefits is reduced. If theLIHTC provisions are repealed or adversely modified, the results of operations of our Affordable Housing Real Estate Services would...
